chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-182 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 1524/2024 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on MA 1525/2024 4.For hearing of Bail Application 28-03-2024 Mr. Aqleem Hyder Shar, Advocate along with applicant. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Applicant Lal Dino Shar seeks protective bail in Crime No.104 of 2023, registered at P.S, Abad-Sukkur, for offence under Section 302, 148, 149, 114 & 34 PPC. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case by the police; that the applicant is ready to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his imminent arrest at the hands of police. Hence, he seeks protection of law. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for period of seven days is granted to the applicant subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/-(Thirty Thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of aforesaid period or the date when the applicant surrenders before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. Meanwhile, operation of NBWs, if any, shall remain suspended for the above period. It is made clear that if the applicant failed to surrender before the trial Court within stipulated period, his bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application along with listed applications is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
